name: workflow-kit
description: Org-native artifact layer for spec-driven development. Document-chain skills (create-prd, promote-design, user-stories, story-closeout, update-design, phase-close), skeptic-reviewer and story-verifier agents, and PRD-lock/auto-format hooks. Designed to layer on obra/superpowers: it owns brainstorming and TDD, this kit owns the record.
